framework_components.component_1_sample_context: Explain the observed response of docetaxel on KPNYN using observed AUC, the RF-predicted AUC, and the local drug/cell cohort baselines.
framework_components.component_2_shap_evidence: Prioritize the top TreeSHAP features, explicitly stating whether each feature pushes the prediction toward higher AUC/resistance or lower AUC/sensitivity.
framework_components.component_3_metadata_grounding: Ground feature descriptions in local metadata only: gene recurrence counts, target matches, fingerprint SMARTS annotations, prevalence across compounds, and same-drug/same-cell cohort examples.
framework_components.component_4_scope_and_caveats: Keep conclusions non-causal, note that SHAP explains the RF prediction rather than biology directly, and separate local case evidence from global training diagnostics.
